\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Abstract base for all command-\/line option parsers. 

Holds the option string (e.\+g. "{}-\/th"{} or "{}-\/-\/help"{}) and exposes a virtual {\ttfamily \doxylink{classCLParser_a966387c58560ab2006b6158b62ea75ce}{Parse()}} method to be implemented by derived classes. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{CLParser_8h_source_l00030}{30}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{CLParser_8h_source}{CLParser.\+h}}.
